headline: Regeneron’s C5 Milestones And Autoimmune Bets Shape Future Valuation
summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (NasdaqGS:REGN) reports multiple milestones in its C5 complement program, including completion of enrollment in its pivotal paroxysmal nocturnal hemoglobinuria (PNH) study. The company announces positive phase III results for cemdisiran in generalized myasthenia gravis and submits data to the US Food and Drug Administration for review. Management is preparing for potential multi indication C5 launches, with initial approvals targeted as early as Q4 2026. Regeneron’s...
